thinkprint.tagline: Thinkprint extracts your decision style and turns it into projects you can actually try.
thinkprint.description: The core loop is simple: personality/thinking extraction → Thinkprint generation → 3 fun projects.

status.label: Status
status.note: We prioritize playful hands-on experience over heavy explanation.

items.reflection: Turn those clues into a visible Thinkprint profile
items.declaration: Run fun projects directly with that Thinkprint

items.profiling: No medical diagnosis or clinical labeling
items.alignment: Not a hidden AI control tool

extract.title: Extract style
extract.description: Read chat signals related to personality and thinking patterns.

calibrate.title: Generate Thinkprint
calibrate.description: Build a clear profile card set from those signals.

deepen.title: Run projects
deepen.description: Try the 3 fun projects with your Thinkprint.

freeze.title: Update with feedback
freeze.description: Refine and save a better next version.

demo.title: Three fun projects
demo.description: Once your Thinkprint is created, you can immediately run these.

blindDate.title: AI Me Blind Date
blindDate.description: See where two styles match or clash in conversation.

persona.title: Persona Battle
persona.description: Compare your style and a famous persona on the same dilemma.

difficulty.title: Find Weak Situations
difficulty.description: Spot contexts where your style may struggle and prepare early.

interactiveDemo.title: Interactive demo
interactiveDemo.description: This is a real Thinkprint flow simulation running on the page.
interactiveDemo.panelSubtitle: Extraction -> Thinkprint generation -> project run -> feedback update

extract.title: Step 1: Extract style clues
extract.subtitle: Conversation is scanned for decision habit signals.
extract.user: I keep hesitating when options are risky.
extract.agent: Noted: risk-avoidance tendency + longer deliberation pattern.
extract.result: Profile seed created from conversation evidence.

generate.title: Step 2: Generate Thinkprint
generate.subtitle: A clear style profile is assembled from extracted clues.
generate.user: I prefer stable choices even if upside is smaller.
generate.agent: Thinkprint updated: stability priority above growth priority.

project.title: Step 3: Run fun project
project.subtitle: The profile is now used in one of the demo projects.
project.user: Run Persona Battle on this business dilemma.
project.agent: Your style picks low-risk expansion, persona picks high-risk acceleration.
project.result: Difference map created: your style vs persona style.

update.title: Step 4: Update with feedback
update.subtitle: Your correction updates the next Thinkprint version.
update.user: Actually, I can take risk if downside is capped.
update.result: Thinkprint v1 saved with updated decision rules.

interactiveDemo.insight: The point: the whole loop runs in one place, and your profile improves each cycle.

output.title: Technical corner
output.description: Core technical foundations: model design, evidence calibration, and safety constraints.

model.title: Psychology Model
model.description: Built on Dual-Process theory, GDMS/MDMQ decision styles, and sensation-seeking constructs.

evidence.title: Evidence & Calibration
evidence.description: Language evidence is scored with sufficiency thresholds, uncertainty bands, and calibrated methods.

safety.title: Safety & Ethics
safety.description: Strict non-clinical boundary, opt-out support, and crisis short-circuit guardrails.

connection.title: With BufferLine
connection.description: Thinkprint creates your style profile. JDVP measures how that style changes over time.
connection.future: Start fun, then connect to real decision improvement

deck.title: See the Thinkprint deck
deck.description: Focused on what is fun and what you can actually try, not protocol details.
